rationale: Filled in stub types (KeyTrait/VerusClone/Ordering/StrictlyOrderedVec) so det.rs verifies standalone. The StrictlyOrderedVec stub stores a Ghost<Seq<K>> so closed-view equality propagates to struct equality. Proof block: under the antecedent, asserts r1==r2 from postconditions, then post1_self_@==post2_self_@, then uses =~= extensionality to conclude post1_self_==post2_self_, yielding det_remove_equal. (Note: this property is genuinely hard against the real-source Vec<K> field since vstd lacks a Vec view-injectivity axiom; recorded for transparency.)
